creator: dave@daveg.ca
text:
It would appear that FreeBSD has had this locale in the past.  Many of my longer running systems have it.

[2:291:591]root@yak:~> locale -a | grep YU
sr_YU.ISO8859-2
sr_YU.ISO8859-5
sr_YU.UTF-8

[2:12:312]dgilbert@vr:~> locale -a | grep YU
sr_YU.ISO8859-2
sr_YU.ISO8859-5
sr_YU.UTF-8

... obviously that website I quoted also had this problem.
